FÉŃĎI TOTE Tote Bag 'Sunshine Handbag'
Classic double-F monogram body, amber two handles are the biggest focal point, looks powerful even when carried alone, not tight on the hand, strong retro feel overall, perfect for fashionistas who like retro style, highly recommended!
